global_description: A small, compact bird with a square tail and pointed wings. It has a dark blue back, pale underparts, and a distinctive chestnut-colored throat and forehead. The bird's wings and tail are dark with lighter edges, and its body is covered in smooth feathers.
spatial_relations: The chestnut throat is below the dark blue head
The pointed wings extend from the sides of the body
The square tail is at the rear of the body
